title: URGENT: fix broken CI
body:
PR #19878 (checking for warnings in system tests) broke upgrade tests.

Reason: my long-ago "optimization" in which, if a PR touches only
tests in X, do not run tests in Y. Unfortunately, upgrade tests
rely on code in the system-test directory. I don't know if this
is fixable; nor if it's an acceptable tradeoff. Please discuss.

Sorry, everyone.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *edsantiago* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [edsantiago] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

Easy fix to prevent this from happening in the future:
```diff
diff --git a/contrib/cirrus/runner.sh b/contrib/cirrus/runner.sh
index f5a4582af..39da686a5 100755
--- a/contrib/cirrus/runner.sh
+++ b/contrib/cirrus/runner.sh
@@ -82,3 +82,3 @@ function _run_sys() {
 function _run_upgrade_test() {
-    _bail_if_test_can_be_skipped test/upgrade
+    _bail_if_test_can_be_skipped test/system test/upgrade
 
```
I deliberately choose not to include that as part of this PR, because this PR is too urgent.

Changes LGTM
You can make up this mistake to us by bringing cookies to the next team meeting!  :cookie:
Will need to be force-merged due to Win Installer b0rkage. (I haven't looked at the failure, but assume it's one of the usual Win Installer failures).
